title: Lifeboat Scarcity and Threshold Deontology
description: Explore whether deontological constraints can be overridden in catastrophic circumstances.

steps.text: Too many people are on a lifeboat with scarce resources, forcing tragic choices.

steps.prompt: Is it permissible to sacrifice one to save several?

steps.text: Threshold deontology allows constraints to yield past a severe threshold.

steps.notes: Does your judgment fit a threshold view?

steps.text: Compare the outcome-maximizing principle to the constraint.

steps.prompt: Would you revise the threshold or your initial judgment?
